name: Massachusetts Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Massachusetts - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description: Prometric, MA Nurse Aide Registry, 7941 Corporate Dr., Nottingham, MD 21236

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

mainEntity.name: Who administers the Massachusetts CNA exam?

acceptedAnswer.text: The MA CNA exam is administered by D&S Headmaster. Contact them at (888) 401-0462 or visit hdmaster.com (Massachusetts CNA section).

mainEntity.name: How do I transfer my CNA to Massachusetts?

acceptedAnswer.text: Contact the MA DPH Nurse Aide Testing Office at (781) 979-4010 or 1-800-962-4337 for reciprocity applications. A CORI background check is required.

mainEntity.name: How do I verify a Massachusetts CNA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use the NARIS (Nurse Aide Registry Information System) at nars.dph.mass.gov or call (617) 753-8144 / email nars@mass.gov.
